non_blocking_notes: No diff-scoped authorization, minor-lane, consent, secrets, personal-data exposure, or runtime audit-log regression found; this slice is static metadata/assets/fonts/CSP/styling plus a docs hard rule.

`./node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit --pretty false` passed. I did not run `npm run build` or `npm run test:e2e` because this Gate 4 run is read-only and those commands write build/test artifacts; Gate 5 still needs the full writable E2E run.
Member-facing strings added by this diff do not add em dashes. The only added em dashes found are in `AGENTS.md`, not rendered site copy.

The worktree contains a stale prior `.codex/audits/polish.review.json` with DO-NOT-SHIP evidence that is now fixed; as in prior slices, the orchestrator should overwrite it with this verdict before merge.

spec_compliance.evidence: `public/assets/share-card.png` and `public/assets/share-card-ar.png` are 1200x630 PNGs. `scripts/make-share-card.mjs` generates EN/AR cards from HTML via Playwright, inlines the real logo asset, uses v3 fonts/sky accent, and limits stats to `1,300+ members · 40+ countries`. Every public EN page now has absolute `og:image` and `twitter:image`; AR pages point `og:image` to the AR card.

`src/layouts/Base.astro` imports Bricolage Grotesque, Hanken Grotesk, and JetBrains Mono from `@fontsource`; `src/styles/ar.css` imports IBM Plex Sans Arabic for AR pages. Source search found no `fonts.googleapis.com` or `fonts.gstatic.com` runtime links.
`src/pages/portal/index.astro` and `src/pages/verify/index.astro` removed the Sora/Inter Google stylesheet links, and `src/portal/ui.ts` uses `var(--display)`, `var(--body)`, and `var(--mono)`.
EN and AR home hero images now use direct `src`, `loading="eager"`, `fetchpriority="high"`, and `decoding="async"`; below-fold lazy `data-src` behavior remains unchanged.
`src/styles/tokens.css` adds `--gold-deep`, `src/styles/membership.css` uses it for gold rung text, and the active language-toggle pill now uses dark text on the sky background.
`public/assets/icon-512.png`, `apple-touch-icon.png`, and `favicon-32.png` have the required dimensions and are wired in `src/layouts/Base.astro`.

spec_compliance.criterion: 8. Tests stay green and new E2E added
spec_compliance.evidence: `tests/e2e/trust-pages.spec.ts` adds EN/AR home `og:image` assertions and coverage for `og:image`, `twitter:image`, and `summary_large_image` on every public EN page. TypeScript passed; full E2E remains Gate 5.
The deferral is recorded in `specs/polish.spec.md`; no `astro:page-load` re-init or home-motion rewrite was introduced.

summary: Ship from Gate 4. The remaining required verification is the normal Gate 5 writable build/E2E run.
